{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Retail Analyst",
  "description": "Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company&#39;s product offerings include 2G, 3G and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Retail Analyst
Job Id:&nbsp;752
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job type:&nbsp;Full-time

About the Role


	The Retail Analyst supports the Retail Operations Lead by providing data-driven insights to optimize retail performance across Airtel Nigeria&rsquo;s store network.
	This role focuses on analyzing sales trends, customer behavior, and operational metrics to improve decision-making, enhance efficiency, and drive revenue growth.
	The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, analytical, and passionate about translating data into actionable business insights.


Responsibilities
Data Analysis &amp; Reporting:


	Collect, analyze, and interpret retail performance data across all stores and regions.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly performance reports and dashboards.
	Track key metrics such as sales, footfall, conversion rates, and product performance.


Sales &amp; Performance Insights:


	Identify trends, gaps, and opportunities to improve store performance.
	Support the Retail Operations Lead with insights to drive sales strategies and initiatives.
	Conduct variance analysis against targets and recommend corrective actions.


Inventory &amp; Product Performance Monitoring;


	Analyze stock levels, product availability, and sell-through rates.
	Identify slow-moving or high-demand products and provide recommendations.
	Collaborate with supply chain teams to ensure optimal stock distribution.


Customer Experience Analytics:


	Analyze customer feedback, complaints, and satisfaction metrics (CSAT/NPS).
	Provide insights to improve in-store customer experience and service delivery.
	Monitor service turnaround times and identify improvement areas.


Process Improvement Support:


	Identify inefficiencies in retail operations using data analysis.
	Support process improvement initiatives and track their impact.
	Assist in the rollout and evaluation of new retail programs and campaigns.


Stakeholder Collaboration:


	Work closely with retail teams, sales, marketing, and finance departments.
	Provide analytical support for business reviews and strategy sessions.
	Present insights and recommendations to internal stakeholders.


Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business, Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, or related field.


Relevant Experience &amp; Functional / Technical Skills:


	Minimum of 5 years of experience in data analysis, retail analytics, or business intelligence.
	Experience in telecom, retail, or FMCG is an advantage.
	Strong analytical and quantitative skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (advanced) and data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau)
	Ability to interpret large datasets and generate actionable insights
	Good communication and presentation skills
	Attention to detail and problem-solving ability
	Basic understanding of retail operations and KPIs.


Note:&nbsp;Airtel Africa is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and remain fully committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace.",

Retail Analyst Job at Airtel Nigeria




        
    

        
        Airtel Nigeria (Airtel Networks Limited) is a leading telecommunications services provider in Nigeria headquartered in Lagos, the commercial nerve-centre of Nigeria. The telco ranks amongst the top four mobile service providers in terms of subscribers with a customer base of more than 39.8 million. The company's product offerings include 2G, 3G and 4G wireless services, mobile commerce and enterprise services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Retail Analyst
Job Id: 752
Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Retail Analyst supports the Retail Operations Lead by providing data-driven insights to optimize retail performance across Airtel Nigeria’s store network.
	This role focuses on analyzing sales trends, customer behavior, and operational metrics to improve decision-making, enhance efficiency, and drive revenue growth.
	The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, analytical, and passionate about translating data into actionable business insights.


Responsibilities
Data Analysis & Reporting:


	Collect, analyze, and interpret retail performance data across all stores and regions.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly performance reports and dashboards.
	Track key metrics such as sales, footfall, conversion rates, and product performance.


Sales & Performance Insights:


	Identify trends, gaps, and opportunities to improve store performance.
	Support the Retail Operations Lead with insights to drive sales strategies and initiatives.
	Conduct variance analysis against targets and recommend corrective actions.


Inventory & Product Performance Monitoring;


	Analyze stock levels, product availability, and sell-through rates.
	Identify slow-moving or high-demand products and provide recommendations.
	Collaborate with supply chain teams to ensure optimal stock distribution.


Customer Experience Analytics:


	Analyze customer feedback, complaints, and satisfaction metrics (CSAT/NPS).
	Provide insights to improve in-store customer experience and service delivery.
	Monitor service turnaround times and identify improvement areas.


Process Improvement Support:


	Identify inefficiencies in retail operations using data analysis.
	Support process improvement initiatives and track their impact.
	Assist in the rollout and evaluation of new retail programs and campaigns.


Stakeholder Collaboration:


	Work closely with retail teams, sales, marketing, and finance departments.
	Provide analytical support for business reviews and strategy sessions.
	Present insights and recommendations to internal stakeholders.


Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, or related field.


Relevant Experience & Functional / Technical Skills:


	Minimum of 5 years of experience in data analysis, retail analytics, or business intelligence.
	Experience in telecom, retail, or FMCG is an advantage.
	Strong analytical and quantitative skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (advanced) and data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau)
	Ability to interpret large datasets and generate actionable insights
	Good communication and presentation skills
	Attention to detail and problem-solving ability
	Basic understanding of retail operations and KPIs.


Note: Airtel Africa is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and remain fully committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cleaner / Office Assistant",
  "description": "Reverse Aesthetics is a premium aesthetic and medical spa based in Victoria Island, Lagos, founded by a renowned and experienced aesthetic physician. The clinic specializes in safe, natural-looking aesthetic enhancements, advanced skin treatments, and non-surgical facial rejuvenation tailored to each client.

Driven by a philosophy of safety, expertise, and subtle excellence, Reverse Aesthetics is known for undetectable results that enhance confidence without altering identity. With a growing footprint across Nigeria, the brand is committed to setting the standard for world-class aesthetic care in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cleaner / Office Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Mabushi, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Cleaner / Office Assistant to support daily operations at Reverse Aesthetics, Abuja (Mabushi branch).
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for maintaining a clean, hygienic, and organized environment while assisting with basic office support tasks.


Key Responsibilities


	Clean and sanitize all areas of the clinic including reception, treatment rooms, restrooms, and offices
	Ensure all cleaning supplies are adequately stocked and properly used
	Maintain a neat and welcoming environment for clients and staff
	Assist with basic office errands and support tasks as assigned
	Handle waste disposal in a safe and hygienic manner
	Support staff with minor day-to-day operational needs
	Follow hygiene and safety standards at all times.


Education &amp; Experience


	Minimum of SSCE
	0 - 1 year of experience in cleaning or office support roles.


Requirements &amp; Skills:


	Good attention to detail and cleanliness
	Ability to work independently and follow instructions
	Reliable, punctual, and hardworking
	Basic communication skills
	Previous experience in a similar role is an added advantage.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;reverseaestheticshr@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Cleaner / Office Assistant &ndash; Abuja (Mabushi)&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Cleaner / Office Assistant Job at Reverse Aesthetics Limited




        
    

        
        Reverse Aesthetics is a premium aesthetic and medical spa based in Victoria Island, Lagos, founded by a renowned and experienced aesthetic physician. The clinic specializes in safe, natural-looking aesthetic enhancements, advanced skin treatments, and non-surgical facial rejuvenation tailored to each client.

Driven by a philosophy of safety, expertise, and subtle excellence, Reverse Aesthetics is known for undetectable results that enhance confidence without altering identity. With a growing footprint across Nigeria, the brand is committed to setting the standard for world-class aesthetic care in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cleaner / Office Assistant
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Mabushi, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Cleaner / Office Assistant to support daily operations at Reverse Aesthetics, Abuja (Mabushi branch).
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for maintaining a clean, hygienic, and organized environment while assisting with basic office support tasks.


Key Responsibilities


	Clean and sanitize all areas of the clinic including reception, treatment rooms, restrooms, and offices
	Ensure all cleaning supplies are adequately stocked and properly used
	Maintain a neat and welcoming environment for clients and staff
	Assist with basic office errands and support tasks as assigned
	Handle waste disposal in a safe and hygienic manner
	Support staff with minor day-to-day operational needs
	Follow hygiene and safety standards at all times.


Education & Experience


	Minimum of SSCE
	0 - 1 year of experience in cleaning or office support roles.


Requirements & Skills:


	Good attention to detail and cleanliness
	Ability to work independently and follow instructions
	Reliable, punctual, and hardworking
	Basic communication skills
	Previous experience in a similar role is an added advantage.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Cleaner / Office Assistant – Abuja (Mabushi)” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Medical Sales Representative (Pharmacist/Nurse)",
  "description": "Ginos Ventures Limited -&nbsp;As an Indigenous distributor of medical consumables and devices across Africa, we provide solutions to all problems of procurement, distribution, and supply of all medical consumables.

We currently distribute for over 15 multinational healthcare companies and have a working relationship with about 60% of healthcare institutions in Nigeria with 23 Medical Representatives and 10 mini distributors that cover major regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative (Pharmacist/Nurse)

Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a motivated and skilled Medical Sales Representative to drive sales efforts, manage customer relationships, and enhance our competitiveness in the healthcare market.


Job Description


	Develop and execute strategic sales plans to grow market share within your assigned territory.
	Identify and onboard new clients for company products.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with healthcare professionals and institutions.
	Promptly resolve client concerns and ensure high customer satisfaction.
	Ensure brand visibility and awareness meet organizational standards within your territory.
	Meet and exceed assigned sales targets.
	Prepare and submit weekly and monthly performance reports to management.
	Deliver products to clients within your assigned territory when required.
	Conduct product presentations and demonstrations to prospective clients.
	Participate in industry events, promotional activities, and networking opportunities.
	Monitor competitors&rsquo; activities and provide market intelligence.
	Perform other duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in a Medical related field. (Pharmacist / Nurse)
	Minimum of 3 years of field sales experience, especially in the Medical / Pharmaceutical Sector.
	Great customer service skills.
	Sound negotiation and sales skills.
	Problem-solving skills.
	Strong organizational skills.
	Must be resident in Abuja and familiar with the locations of health institutions in the FCT.
	Should be able to drive a car.
	Effective communication skills.
	Male candidates are strongly advised to apply for gender equality.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;ginosvacancy@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Medical Sales Representative Abuja&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Medical Sales Representative (Pharmacist/Nurse) Job at Ginos Ventures Limited




        
    

        
        Ginos Ventures Limited - As an Indigenous distributor of medical consumables and devices across Africa, we provide solutions to all problems of procurement, distribution, and supply of all medical consumables.

We currently distribute for over 15 multinational healthcare companies and have a working relationship with about 60% of healthcare institutions in Nigeria with 23 Medical Representatives and 10 mini distributors that cover major regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative (Pharmacist/Nurse)

Job Location:  Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a motivated and skilled Medical Sales Representative to drive sales efforts, manage customer relationships, and enhance our competitiveness in the healthcare market.


Job Description


	Develop and execute strategic sales plans to grow market share within your assigned territory.
	Identify and onboard new clients for company products.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with healthcare professionals and institutions.
	Promptly resolve client concerns and ensure high customer satisfaction.
	Ensure brand visibility and awareness meet organizational standards within your territory.
	Meet and exceed assigned sales targets.
	Prepare and submit weekly and monthly performance reports to management.
	Deliver products to clients within your assigned territory when required.
	Conduct product presentations and demonstrations to prospective clients.
	Participate in industry events, promotional activities, and networking opportunities.
	Monitor competitors’ activities and provide market intelligence.
	Perform other duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	A Bachelor's Degree in a Medical related field. (Pharmacist / Nurse)
	Minimum of 3 years of field sales experience, especially in the Medical / Pharmaceutical Sector.
	Great customer service skills.
	Sound negotiation and sales skills.
	Problem-solving skills.
	Strong organizational skills.
	Must be resident in Abuja and familiar with the locations of health institutions in the FCT.
	Should be able to drive a car.
	Effective communication skills.
	Male candidates are strongly advised to apply for gender equality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using "Medical Sales Representative Abuja" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrician",
  "description": "VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria&rsquo;s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.

Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company&rsquo;s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrician

Job Location:&nbsp;Igbesa, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Candidates must have more than five years of relevant work experience.
	The position involves handling all electrical tasks within a beverage company&rsquo;s production and operations, including installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of electrical equipment, ensuring the safe and stable operation of production lines
	Applicants should be able to independently carry out troubleshooting and repairs of various electrical systems, be familiar with electrical regulations, and possess solid technical skills along with extensive practical experience.


Salary
N100,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;vijutalent@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  },

Electrician Job at Viju Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria’s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company’s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrician

Job Location: Igbesa, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Candidates must have more than five years of relevant work experience.
	The position involves handling all electrical tasks within a beverage company’s production and operations, including installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of electrical equipment, ensuring the safe and stable operation of production lines
	Applicants should be able to independently carry out troubleshooting and repairs of various electrical systems, be familiar with electrical regulations, and possess solid technical skills along with extensive practical experience.


Salary
N100,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Prezgreel Investment Limited is a registered healthcare procurement company (RC: 1115629) with over 12 years of experience supplying medical devices, hospital consumables, and orthopedic implants. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Medical Sales Representative (Pharmacist / Nurse)

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a motivated and skilled Medical Sales Representative to drive sales efforts, manage customer relationships, and enhance our competitiveness in the healthcare market.


Job Description


	Develop and execute strategic sales plans to grow market share within your assigned territory.
	Identify and onboard new clients for company products.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with healthcare professionals and institutions.
	Promptly resolve client concerns and ensure high customer satisfaction.
	Ensure brand visibility and awareness meet organizational standards within your territory.
	Meet and exceed assigned sales targets.
	Prepare and submit weekly and monthly performance reports to management.
	Deliver products to clients within your assigned territory when required.
	Conduct product presentations and demonstrations to prospective clients.
	Participate in industry events, promotional activities, and networking opportunities.
	Monitor competitors&rsquo; activities and provide market intelligence.
	Perform other duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in a Medical related field (Pharmacist/Nurse)
	Minimum of 3 years of field sales experience, especially in the Medical / Pharmaceutical Sector.
	Great customer service skills.
	Sound negotiation and sales skills.
	Problem-solving skills.
	Strong organizational skills.
	Must be resident in Abuja and familiar with the locations of health institutions in the FCT.
	Should be able to drive a car.
	Effective communication skills.
	Male candidates are strongly advised to apply for gender equality.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;urgentvacancy50@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Medical Sales Representative Abuja&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

        Prezgreel Investment Limited is a registered healthcare procurement company (RC: 1115629) with over 12 years of experience supplying medical devices, hospital consumables, and orthopedic implants.
